LIGHT IN THE SOCIETY INTERNATIONAL

Lighting up society, transforming the world

About Us

About Light In The Society International

Light in the Society International (LITS) is a registered NGO in Kenya dedicated to empowering youth, women, and vulnerable communities. Through education, peace promotion, talent development, and environmental conservation, we work to build a united and prosperous society guided by love, peace, and unity.”

Our Core Values

Empowering communities through sustainable development and social unity.

Poverty Alleviation

Training programs enhancing skills and leadership among youth.We create pathways out of poverty by equipping vulnerable communities with skills, opportunities, and resources that promote self-reliance and long-term growth.

Youth & Women Empowerment

Through mentorship, training, and exposure, we empower youth and women to unlock their potential, nurture their talents, and become leaders of change in society.

Environmental Conservation

Our programs inspire young people to take action in protecting natural resources, planting trees, and creating sustainable solutions

Peace Promotion

We champion peace, love, and unity by engaging communities in dialogue, peace walks, and awareness forums that foster harmony and mutual respect.
